title: Safe GSC UI Indexing Automation Policy — PHASE 13C.8
purpose: Define strict rules for automated GSC UI 'Request Indexing' via CloakBrowser

absolute_prohibitions.no_indexing_api: Google Indexing API must NOT be used for calculators/blogs/guides/decisions/tools — ONLY valid for JobPosting/BroadcastEvent
absolute_prohibitions.no_fake_schema: Must NOT add JobPosting or BroadcastEvent schema to non-eligible pages
absolute_prohibitions.no_mass_requests: Max 10 URLs per day total across ALL indexing methods
absolute_prohibitions.no_duplicate_requests: Same URL must NOT be requested again within 7 days unless a major technical fix changed the page
absolute_prohibitions.no_risky_automations: SEO Indexing Engine, Sitemap Ping, Blog Agent, Scenario Generator/Upgrades — ALL STAY PAUSED

must_pass_all.rule: Robots meta must be 'index, follow' or equivalent. NOT 'noindex'.
must_pass_all.fail_action: Skip — noindex pages should not be requested for indexing

must_pass_all.rule: Canonical must point to SELF, not to a different page
must_pass_all.fail_action: Skip — canonicalized pages confuse Google if individually requested

must_pass_all.rule: URL should be in sitemap.xml if intended for indexing
must_pass_all.fail_action: Warn — add to sitemap if intended to be indexed

must_pass_all.rule: URL must NOT be a Phase 2 cleanup-lag URL (geo/scenario/formula pruned pages)
URL must NOT have been requested for indexing in the last 7 days
must_pass_all.fail_action: Skip — wait for Google to process previous request

must_pass_all.rule: URL must score above minimum priority threshold

priority_order.description: Pages with recent content/title/meta changes that need Google re-crawl
10 core calculators — highest-value pages on site
Decision pages with strong content and internal links
Top comparison pages with unique value
Pages ranking 1-30 with impressions but 0 clicks
Pages with GSC impressions and 0 clicks
Pages with recently fixed technical issues (canonical, robots, etc.)

if_blocked.action: FALLBACK — do NOT ask Qasem immediately
alternatives: Submit sitemap.xml + news-sitemap.xml to GSC via API
Add new internal links from indexed pages to target URL
Update lastmod in sitemap if page has changed
Wait 24h and retry GSC UI session
Report blocker to Qasem only if session remains blocked for 48h+

if_quota_exceeded.action: Queue remaining URLs for next day
if_quota_exceeded.note: Google limits ~10-20 manual requests per day

session_management.auth_check_url: Inspect page URL for qfinhub property
session_management.re_auth_required_if: accounts.google.com appears in URL or challenge/verify in URL
session_management.session_reuse: Works in headless mode — PROVEN Jun 4 (7/7 success)
